description: Golden cases for building local HTML FEM geometry viewers from BDF inputs.

cases.title: Synthetic plate BDF
cases.purpose: Verify that a small CQUAD4 plate produces geometry JSON, static viewer files, and a localhost URL.
checks: node and element counts match the source deck
geometry JSON contains nodes and shell element connectivity
result exposes summary and artifact paths only

cases.title: Diagnostic BDF
cases.purpose: Verify that duplicate, floating, and free-edge diagnostics remain available in the viewer geometry payload.
checks: duplicate node group count is reported

cases.title: Missing BDF path
cases.purpose: Verify controlled failure when the requested BDF file does not exist.
checks: tool fails without creating a misleading viewer
